rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Use only identifiers and types present in the AADL model; do not introduce package-qualified names.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion.
Avoid introducing new data types or identifiers not defined in the input AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings require valid subcomponent and connection context.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
